data.loc_delta_total: +1,562 / -2,750 across all merges (cumulative); index.html net change ≈ +220 source LOC; tests 0 → 31 across 5 spec files
data.summary: Phase 1 P0 hygiene + Phase 2 charter + Phase 3 (4/4 slots) + post-Phase-3 hygiene sweep. Charter scope met (A2 closes 4/5, Guard 3 documented-deferred — no surface). Playwright arming landed in PR #3; SW install bug surfaced + closed in PR #6; full validation matrix shipped across PRs #7-#10. Hygiene queue closed in #11.
decisions_load_bearing: PR #1 historical (Nyx + Sovereign pre-dawn). Phase 1 P0 was sep-dashboard PR #2 (.gitignore + SEP_Backup rm).
Build Rule #1 amendment ratified (production artifact single-file, dev-deps permitted gitignored). PR #3.
Phase 3 lock: A1+A4 / A2 / B2; rejected B1 (design-surface risk on locked 4.5/5).
dash-3-2 pre-split into 2a inv-layer / 2b ops-layer per Aurelius R3, saved a round-2 cycle (D5 in action).
doctrines_surfaced_or_ratified: D1 — navigator.serviceWorker.ready is canonical SW-activation wait (PR #6, Aurelius merge).
D2 — Fix sibling races on discovery (PR #6, ratified at merge; applied PR #7 round 2 + PR #8 + PR #10).
D3 — Doctrine self-validation cycle (catch → iterate → ratify → next surface, 16-min interval) (PR #7).
D4 — Independent convergence on workarounds = stability signal (PR #7).
R10 refinement — split-threshold gates UI/feature scope, not data-integrity remediation (PR #7).
D5 — Doctrine compounding flattens cycles via proactive application (PR #8, empirically validated PR #9).
Dead-code hygiene-sweep doctrine — findings queue, batch into atomic sweeps (PR #8 → executed PR #11).
D6 — Builder-may-improve-on-prescription (3 instances on-record: serviceWorker.ready PR #6, _helpers.ts PR #9, csvCell defensiveness PR #10) (PR #10).
D7 — Lock guards writes, not reads (boundary doctrine) (PR #10, made explicit by export-buttons-stay-available framing).
doctrine_candidates_pending_aurelius: D8 — Citation-integrity is a Cipher-canonical review surface (3 on-record catches: HR-7→HR-5 PR #8, canon-0002→canon-0006 PR #9, byte-for-byte→semantically PR #11). Pattern: Builder reads change correctly, description drifts, Cipher's externalized eyes catch it.
production_bugs_closed: sw.js cache.addAll all-or-nothing fragility — any user blocked from Google Fonts got zero offline support. Closed PR #6 with Promise.allSettled + per-asset cache.add.
lore_generated: Cycle-count table for D5 empirical validation (Aurelius PR #9 merge).
First Builder-pass / Cipher-fail divergence under Playwright arming (PR #6 round 1; round 2 closed it).
First D2 incompleteness round-1 / round-2 cycle on Builder side (PR #7 togglePeriod cluster).
